source_anchors.claim: active game installs primary interface mouse table before secondary movement mouse table
G0447 primary interface and G0448 secondary movement mouse rows define commands, zones and original button masks
mouse hit-test scans table order and requires source button mask plus point-in-zone match
primary table is checked before secondary; command and original x/y are queued
pending click replays stored x/y/button status
PC/I34E screen and viewport dimensions are 320x200 with viewport x=0 y=33 w=224 h=136
runtime zone hit-test is inclusive at source bounds
MOUSE_INPUT layout and masks 0x0001 right, 0x0002 left, 0x0004 left-up

status_reason: The new CTest target runs the M11 touch-pointer dispatch seam through translation, command-queue enqueue, and pending-click replay with source-order primary-before-secondary expectations and original button masks/coordinates.
